title: Best Next.js Personal Website Templates (2026): 12 Options Ranked
description: Your personal website is the one project you never seem to finish. We tested 12 templates to help you pick the best one for your portfolio.
author: Amin

blocks.content:
Your personal website is the one project you never seem to finish. You start from scratch, burn a weekend on layout decisions, and end up with something that looks worse than a GitHub README.

A good Next.js personal website template fixes this. You get a production-ready foundation with responsive design, dark mode, SEO, and a blog system built in. Customize the content, deploy to Vercel, and move on to work that actually matters.

blocks.text: The best personal website is the one that ships. Don't spend months perfecting your portfolio when a template can get you 90% of the way there in a weekend.
blocks.author: Tim Lrx

blocks.content:
## Key Takeaways

If you remember nothing else from this article:

- **Tailwind Next.js Starter Blog** (6k+ stars) is the best free option for writers and bloggers
- **Chronark.com** is the cleanest developer portfolio template with built-in analytics
- **Vercel Templates** offer the widest variety, but quality varies significantly
- **Paid templates** are worth it if you need advanced features like MDX, search, and analytics out of the box

blocks.alt: Comparison of Next.js personal website templates
blocks.caption: Figure 1: Side-by-side comparison of the top 12 templates ranked in this article

blocks.content:
## #1: Tailwind Next.js Starter Blog

**Best for:** Writers, bloggers, and developers who prioritize content

**GitHub:** [timlrx/tailwind-nextjs-starter-blog](https://github.com) | **Demo:** [tailwind-nextjs-starter-blog.vercel.app](https://vercel.app)

The most complete Next.js personal website template for content creators. With over 6,000 GitHub stars, it is the most popular personal site template in the Next.js ecosystem — and for good reason.

slides.caption: Template homepage with dark mode enabled
Blog post view with MDX support

blocks.content: The template includes everything you need: MDX blog with tags, RSS feed, sitemap generation, SEO optimization with JSON-LD, dark mode, and analytics support. It uses the App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is the best free Next.js personal website template?

The **Tailwind Next.js Starter Blog** by timlrx is the best free option with over 6,000 GitHub stars. It includes MDX blog support, dark mode, SEO optimization, RSS feeds, sitemap generation, and tag-based filtering. It uses the App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS and works on Vercel with one-click deployment.

blocks.text: Good artists copy, great artists steal. Pick a template, make it your own, and focus on creating content that matters.
blocks.author: Anonymous

blocks.content:
## Final Verdict

After testing all 12 templates, here's our recommendation:

| Use Case | Best Template |
|----------|---------------|
| **Blogging** | Tailwind Next.js Starter Blog |
| **Developer Portfolio** | Chronark.com |
| **Minimalist** | Nextfolio |
| **Full-featured** | Next.js + Contentlayer |

Choose based on your primary use case. All templates are excellent starting points.
